calendar.matters:
Verified Petition Of Beneficiary To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee; And For Injunctive And Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Off Calendar

Motion For Preliminary Injunction Pending Hearing On Petition To Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Erhardt for and with Elizabeth Saghi (Petitioner). Bruce Mcintosh for and with Allan Saghi (Trustee). Michael Saghi (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court ruled that the temporary restraining order is dissolved and the the preliminary injunction is denied stating that the Petitioner failed to show that she is likely to prevail on the merits and irreparable harm.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
